name: property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent scheduling causes tenant dissatisfaction. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent scheduling of equipment inspections leads to delayed repairs.
